## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Memorialize validated improvements as permanent, searchable knowledge.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S01): Turn the static knowledge repository into an active decision-making system with mandatory retrieval, source citation, decision traces, memorialization, and a knowledge graph.

## THE ONE ACTION
Implement memorialization that appends validated improvements to the library and re-indexes them; demonstrate on one validated improvement.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
print('IMPLEMENT memorialization; append+reindex one validated improvement')
PY
```
